findings.title: Outbound network request
findings.description: Code makes outbound network request via config.get()
findings.code_snippet:
# Set up email server
    server = smtplib.SMTP_SSL(config['server'], config['port']) if config.get('useTLS') else smtplib.SMTP(config['server'], config['port'])
    server.login(config['username'], config['password'])
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.
